name: Orebro County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gules field of the Narke arms

description: A square red flag charged centrally with the gold scales of justice from the historic Narke provincial arms.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Orebro County, derived from the coat of arms of the historic province of Narke.

features.symbolism: the gules field of the historic Narke provincial arms
a pair of gold scales (balance) on a red field, the historic emblem of the province of Narke that forms part of Orebro County.
